# CodingDatafy

> Master coding with CodingDatafy expert-led documentation. On a mission to build the world's largest reference and knowledge base for coding languages.

## Core Reference Pages
- [Homepage](https://www.codingdatafy.com/) - CodingDatafy main entrance.
- [Programming Languages Directory](https://www.codingdatafy.com/languages) - Our core coding documentation.
- [FAQ](https://www.codingdatafy.com/faq) - Frequently Asked Questions.
- [About Us](https://www.codingdatafy.com/about) - About CodingDatafy Organization.
- [Contribute Guide](https://www.codingdatafy.com/contribute) - How to contribute to our open-source repositories.

## Legal & Contact
- [Contact Us](https://www.codingdatafy.com/contact) - Get in touch with our team.
- [Terms of Use](https://www.codingdatafy.com/terms-of-use) - Terms and conditions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.codingdatafy.com/privacy-policy) - Privacy policy and data handling.
